texto: It's all about the sensuality of movement, every movement you make. That's why I love doing action movies. It's all about movement, dance - even if you're hitting someone in the face. You've got to sell it all with great passion. There's a narrative to the body. It's exactly the same as dance.
explicacao: Citação de DeObia Oparei sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “It's all about the sensuality of movement, every movement you make. That's why I love doing actio…” articula amor, love, great em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como great e dance.

frase_original: It's all about the sensuality of movement, every movement you make. That's why I love doing action movies. It's all about movement, dance - even if you're hitting someone in the face. You've got to sell it all with great passion. There's a narrative to the body. It's exactly the same as dance.
